summary: Completed comprehensive testing of sidebar navigation redesign and Training Courses admin features. All backend APIs return 200. Sidebar navigation correctly shows Italian labels with icon+label alignment. Course cards open course detail page. Admin summary visible in course detail for editor role with interested/confirmed/enrolled counts. Status update endpoint works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar navigation uses soft-card/pill pattern with rounded corners (border-radius: 22px)
Icon and label aligned horizontally via flexbox in .sidebar-link
Active state implemented with gradient backgrounds and shadow for clear visual indication
Group headers displayed as uppercase 10px bold with decorative line separator
Italian labels correctly implemented: Dashboard, Avvio contenuti, Produzione guidata, etc.
Training Courses admin tabs (Catalogo, Operatività corsi, Scadenze pagamenti) working for editor
Course detail page shows admin summary with interested/confirmed/enrolled counts
Status update works inline from both TrainingCoursesPage operations tab and CourseDetailPage admin card
seed_data_creation: Existing test cohorts with members available for testing status updates
context_for_next_testing_agent: All sidebar navigation and Training Courses features verified working. Studio sidebar (dark theme main, light sidebar) has groups: Avvio, Produzione, Contenuti, Impostazioni. School sidebar (light theme) has groups: Community, Risorse, Gestione scuola. Course cards in catalog open detail page via /course/{courseId} route. Admin summary card shows participation counts. Bulk installments UI has 'Piani rate cumulativi' section but quick template buttons only appear when enrolled participants exist.

features_verified.studio_sidebar_navigation: PASS - 12 links visible with Italian labels, icon+label horizontal alignment, soft-card pattern
features_verified.studio_sidebar_groups: PASS - Avvio, Produzione, Contenuti, Impostazioni headers
features_verified.school_sidebar_navigation: PASS - 14 links visible for editor role with Italian labels
features_verified.school_sidebar_groups: PASS - Community, Risorse, Gestione scuola headers
features_verified.course_cards_open_detail: PASS - Click 'Apri scheda corso' navigates to /course/{courseId}
features_verified.course_detail_admin_summary: PASS - Editor sees 'Vista amministrativa del corso' with INTERESSATI/CONFERMATI/ISCRITTI counts
features_verified.training_courses_operations_tab: PASS - Course/Edition selectors, create edition, add participant forms visible
features_verified.bulk_installments_card: PASS - 'Piani rate cumulativi' section visible with 'Salva piani rate' button
features_verified.backend_admin_summary_200: PASS - GET /api/school/training-courses/{courseId}/admin-summary returns summary and editions
